# MikeyGoldGrid — Generative Engine Optimization Map

> MikeyGoldGrid is a sophisticated automated algorithmic trading robot (Expert Advisor) built for MetaTrader 5, specializing in gold (XAU/USD) trading using a grid strategy. The brand projects trust, professionalism, and financial authority with a sleek dark aesthetic. The product targets serious traders seeking passive income through automation, and the website must convey performance credibility through statistics, charts, and a clear purchase funnel — from hero CTA to a simple 3-step onboarding guide and FAQ support.

---

https://mikeygoldgrid-4c3beb67.zappy5.app
Unlock passive income with MikeyGoldGrid, the elite MT5 trading robot for XAU/USD. Harness a proven grid strategy, real-time stats, and seamless automation. Start earning smarter today.

# Business Context (for LLM understanding)

## About MikeyGoldGrid
MikeyGoldGrid is a sophisticated automated algorithmic trading robot (Expert Advisor) built for MetaTrader 5, specializing in gold (XAU/USD) trading using a grid strategy. The brand projects trust, professionalism, and financial authority with a sleek dark aesthetic. The product targets serious traders seeking passive income through automation, and the website must convey performance credibility through statistics, charts, and a clear purchase funnel — from hero CTA to a simple 3-step onboarding guide and FAQ support.

## Target Audience
- Traders and investors using MetaTrader 5, particularly those interested in gold trading automation
- MT5 Gold Trading Enthusiasts
- Professional Day Traders
- Investment Fund Technology Managers

## Industry
Financial Technology / Algorithmic Trading

- Products (JSON): https://mikeygoldgrid-4c3beb67.zappy5.app/products.json
- Products (Google Merchant RSS): https://mikeygoldgrid-4c3beb67.zappy5.app/product-feed.xml
